feat(prism-dashboard): add cost & routing observability panel for Zed sidebar

Adds a new prism-dashboard GPUI crate that renders a right-dock panel in Zed
with four collapsible sections: Cost Overview, Per-Model Cost, Waste Score,
and Routing Policy. Data is fetched from the PrisM gateway management API
every 60 seconds (env vars PRISM_GATEWAY_URL + PRISM_API_KEY).

Changes:
- prism-types: 9 new shared response types (SummaryResponse, StatGroup,
  WasteScoreResponse, TaskTypeStatsResponse, TaskTypeStat, SelectionCriteria,
  RoutingRule, PolicyResponse, FitnessEntry) with Serialize + Deserialize
- prism-client: 4 new management API methods + handle_response<T> helper;
  re-exports new types for panel consumption
- prism: api/stats.rs and api/routing.rs now use shared types from prism-types
  instead of local definitions; routing/types.rs re-exports SelectionCriteria
  and RoutingRule from prism-types
- prism-dashboard: new crate with PrismDashboardPanel (persistent width,
  section expand state, 60s auto-refresh, graceful no-gateway state)
- zed: wired panel into initialize_panels() and init() alongside uglyhat-panel
- zed: fixed pre-existing EditPredictionProvider::Prism match exhaustiveness
  errors in edit_prediction.rs, edit_prediction_button.rs, and agent_ui.rs

commit.message:
Fix git operations hanging on credential prompt

Git clone/fetch/push commands were blocking the Node process because:
1. No stdio:'pipe' on clone — git prompted for credentials on stdin
2. Credential helper (osxkeychain) not in PATH under pnpm/node context

Fix: shared git-env module that injects GIT_EXEC_PATH, adds git-core
paths to PATH, and sets GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 to fail fast instead
of hanging. All git operations in git-ops.ts and agent-tools.ts now
use this environment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement MVP: full TypeScript web app for managing Claude tasks

Backend (Hono + Node.js):
- SQLite persistence via Drizzle ORM (~/.folio/folio.db)
- Bearer token authentication on all routes
- REST API: projects CRUD, tasks CRUD + start/stop/approve/reject
- WebSocket hub with token auth on handshake, auto-broadcast
- Task runner: node-pty spawns claude CLI on a git branch,
  streams output to WS clients and persists to task_logs table
- Approve: commits changes and merges branch into main
- Reject: discards branch and resets task to backlog

Frontend (React 19 + Vite + Tailwind + shadcn/ui):
- Token gate with localStorage persistence
- Sidebar with project list, add/delete project dialogs
- Kanban board: 5 columns (Backlog/In Progress/Review/Done/Error)
- Task cards with priority indicator, status badge, inline actions
- Task creation form with title, description, priority, category
- Task detail panel with xterm.js terminal (historical replay + live)
- WebSocket hook with exponential backoff reconnection
- All state updates via WS broadcast — no polling

Shared:
- TypeScript types package consumed by both backend and frontend

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix audio thread destructor race and socket write safety

1. NotificationManager destructor: wait(1000) could return with thread
   still running, then delete m_soundEffect from under it. Now waits 3s,
   terminates if still alive. Also removed 'this' capture from playSound
   lambda — captures QSoundEffect* directly to avoid use-after-free if
   NotificationManager is destroyed while lambda is queued.

2. ClaudeHookClient::sendEvent(): write() return value was unchecked —
   partial writes would go undetected. Now verifies all bytes were written
   before waiting for flush.

commit.message:
Part 39: SU(3) 4D Lattice Monte Carlo -- confirms 4% result in full 3+1D

Extends Part 38 from 2D to 4D Wilson-action lattice. Strong coupling
analytical result sigma_4D = 0.1729 GeV^2 (4% off QCD 0.18) is identical
to 2D at leading order; O(beta^2) correction ~0.0005 GeV^2 negligible.
Polyakov loop correlator added for finite-temperature string tension.
CPU only (CUDA install pending on RTX 3060). Part 40 defined: Wilson
fermion hopping term to close the remaining 4% gap.

Files: su3_lattice_4d.py (Phase 14), su3_lattice_4d.md, main.py, TODO.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Signal waterfall + wire snippet library into copy writing

Signal scan rewritten with waterfall logic:
- Tier 1: Signalbase, Commonroom, Jungler, Trigify (dedicated signal platforms)
- Tier 2: Sentrion.ai, Fantastic.jobs (job post monitoring)
- Tier 3: Exa, Firecrawl, Crunchbase (web/search signals — free)
- Tier 4: Crispy/Sales Nav (LinkedIn signals — included)
- Checks TOOLS.md + .env before querying — skips inactive/missing keys
- Deduplicates across sources, displays scan plan before running
- Uses Trigger > Relevance > Value > Ask framework for drafts

Copy writing now loads snippet-library.md and swipe-file.md:
- Proven opening lines, CTAs, and proof lines matched to channel/angle
- Full sequence examples matched to campaign type as structural guides
- Also loads campaign-types.md for type-specific defaults

fix(socket): polling-first transport for Railway WebSocket compatibility

Start with polling to establish HTTP handshake through Railway proxy,
then upgrade to WebSocket. Fixes wss:// connection failures in production.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive tests for hooks and associations

Hooks: InsertIgnore, batch insert, BeforeUpdate error blocking,
AfterScan error blocking, hook mutating object before save,
FetchOne AfterScan, BeforeSave error blocking replace.

Associations: FetchOne with WithPreload, HasMany with no related
records, BelongsTo with orphan FK, mixed HasMany (some with/without
related records).

commit.message:
Fix modal PLATFORMS row: use creator.socialPlatforms directly

The PLATFORMS icon row in the modal's left sidebar was using
availablePlatforms (a complex memo merging enrichment data) which
could resolve to just ["instagram"] before enrichment completed.
Changed to read creator.socialPlatforms directly — the same source
the BrandDiscover cards use, which already contains the correct
multi-platform list from the IC search result.

ChatBloc → ApiChatRepository → backend. AI now knows which app to query.

commit.message:
feat: prediction fix, persona swap, circuit breaker, XP penalties, rate limits, error logging

- Fix prediction market divide-by-zero when winnerPool=0 (floor rounding, remainder to largest bettor)
- Hot-swappable persona system (setPersona + /persona command, runtime swap without restart)
- Tool call circuit breaker in claude.js (3 failures → 30s cooldown, auto-resume)
- XP penalties + action cooldowns (penalizeXP, /gm daily cap, 5s message cooldown)
- Command-level rate limiting (scanner 10s, liquidations 30s, alpha 15s, digest 60s)
- Fix peerChangePool iterator bug (was skipping every other entry during pruning)
- Group context window periodic cleanup (evict 24h stale windows every 6h)
- Error logging added to 8 silent catch blocks across antispam, crpc, threads, hell, scheduler, knowledge-chain

commit.message:
Add whale signal executor mode for following Polymarket whale trades on Kalshi

Polls polymarket-tracker DB for TRADEABLE alerts matching high-conviction
filters (ELITE wallet, NBA moneyline, midrange bucket, gap >= -5c), then
places $2 BUY orders on Kalshi following the whale's direction. Supports
paper trading (READ_ONLY) and live execution modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make obstacle patterns deterministic with seeded RNG

Replace all Math.random() in pattern generation with a seeded PRNG
(Mulberry32). Same seed = same obstacle layout every run.

- Playable game (index.html): fixed seed 42, resets on each game start
- RL environment (game-env.js): supports seed pools, rotates through
  10 seeds during training so the agent learns general skills
- Particle effects remain truly random (cosmetic only)
